status.title: Verification status
status.intro: Verification is scope-based: each area is assessed independently. There is no single "verified" badge.
status.disclaimer: A supplier is never simply "verified". Each scope below reflects an independent assessment against submitted evidence.
status.empty: No verification scopes have been requested yet.
status.evidenceCount: {count, plural, =0 {No linked evidence} one {# linked file} other {# linked files}}
